items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis found potential sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after primary ACL reconstruction, with female athletes possibly having lower RTS rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析揭示了 ACL 重建术后女性运动员重返运动（RTS）率可能低于男性。你在康复计划中必须关注性别差异，为女性患者提供更个性化、更全面的心理和生理支持，以提高其 RTS 成功率。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析发现，初次 ACL 重建术后重返运动（RTS）结果可能存在性别差异，女性运动员的 RTS 率可能较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis reveals that female athletes may have lower return-to-sport (RTS) rates after ACL reconstruction than males. In your rehabilitation plans, you must address sex disparities by providing more individualized and comprehensive psychological and physiological support for female patients to improve their RTS success rates.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review found that the duration of supervised rehabilitation is associated with improved functional outcomes and reduced re-injury risk following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR).
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述强调了监督康复持续时间对 ACL 重建术后结果的重要性。你应与患者充分沟通，确保他们接受足够长时间的监督康复，这直接影响再损伤风险和功能恢复，不能随意缩短。
items.titleZh: 监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结果的影响：一项系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，监督康复的持续时间与前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后的功能结果改善和再损伤风险降低相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights the importance of supervised rehabilitation duration for outcomes after ACL reconstruction. You should communicate thoroughly with patients to ensure they receive a sufficiently long period of supervised rehabilitation, as this directly impacts re-injury risk and functional recovery, and should not be arbitrarily shortened.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effectiveness of Radial Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy Versus Other Electrophysical Modalities on Pain and Functionality in Patients With Plantar Fasciitis: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) was more effective than other electrophysical modalities in reducing pain and improving functionality in patients with plantar fasciitis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，体外径向冲击波疗法（rESWT）在治疗足底筋膜炎方面优于其他电物理疗法。你应该将 rESWT 视为足底筋膜炎的一线物理治疗选择，并根据其明确的证据级别，向患者解释其疗效优势。
items.titleZh: 体外径向冲击波疗法与其他电物理疗法对足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和功能的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，体外径向冲击波疗法（rESWT）在减轻足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和改善功能方面优于其他电物理疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis found that radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) is superior to other electrophysical modalities for plantar fasciitis. You should consider rESWT a first-line physical therapy option for plantar fasciitis and, based on its clear evidence, explain its efficacy advantages to patients.

items.title: How direct access to physiotherapy reshapes GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal care in primary care: an exploratory organisational typology across health systems.
items.summary: This qualitative content analysis characterizes organizational roles of physiotherapists in direct access models, describing how GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal conditions is redistributed across health systems.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究揭示了不同健康系统中物理治疗师直接准入（DA）模式如何重塑全科医生对肌肉骨骼疾病的把关作用。你应关注这些 DA 模型如何影响患者路径和医疗资源分配，这直接关系到物理治疗师的执业范围和行业地位。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师直接准入如何重塑初级医疗中全科医生对肌肉骨骼疾病的把关作用：一项跨卫生系统的探索性组织类型学研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性内容分析研究描述了物理治疗师直接准入模式下的组织角色配置，并探讨了全科医生对肌肉骨骼疾病的把关作用如何在不同卫生系统中重新分配。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study reveals how direct access (DA) physiotherapy models reshape GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal conditions across health systems. You should pay attention to how these DA models influence patient pathways and resource allocation, as this directly impacts the scope of physiotherapy practice and professional standing.

items.title: Telerehabilitation in Community Stroke Services: Mixed Methods Evaluation of Current Practice and Lessons for Sustained Use.
items.summary: This mixed-methods evaluation explores the current practice and lessons learned for sustained use of telerehabilitation in community stroke services, incorporating insights from clinical teams and stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项混合方法评估揭示了远程康复在社区卒中服务中的整合现状及持续使用经验。你应关注临床团队和患者的反馈，了解远程康复在卒中后实践中的优势和挑战，以优化你的远程服务交付。
items.titleZh: 社区卒中服务中的远程康复：对当前实践和持续使用经验的混合方法评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项混合方法评估研究了远程康复在社区卒中服务中的当前实践和持续使用经验，并吸取了临床团队和卒中患者的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mixed methods evaluation sheds light on the current integration and sustained use of telerehabilitation in community stroke services. You should pay attention to clinical teams' and patients' feedback to understand the benefits and challenges in post-stroke practice, optimizing your telerehab service delivery.

items.title: Physiotherapists' perception of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified physiotherapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to implementing digital health interventions (DHIs), highlighting areas for improved adoption in practice.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述识别了物理治疗师实施数字健康干预（DHIs）的障碍和促进因素。你应该主动了解这些因素，以便更好地将远程医疗、App 辅助康复等 DHIs 整合到你的日常实践中，提升患者依从性和治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法：一项范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了物理治疗师对实施数字健康干预（DHIs）的障碍和促进因素的看法，强调了在实践中改进采用的领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies barriers and facilitators to physiotherapists implementing digital health interventions (DHIs). You should proactively understand these factors to better integrate DHIs like telehealth and app-assisted rehabilitation into your daily practice, thereby improving patient adherence and treatment outcomes.

items.title: Integrating multi-session transcranial direct current stimulation with routine physical therapy to improve quadriceps strength and activation in athletes during subacute recovery following ACL reconstruction: A double-blind RCT.
items.summary: A double-blind RCT (N=20) found that integrating multi-session anodal transcranial direct current stimulation with routine physical therapy improved quadriceps strength and activation in male athletes during subacute recovery post-ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项双盲 RCT 表明，在 ACLR 亚急性恢复期，多疗程经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗能显著改善股四头肌力量和激活。对于膝关节术后患者，这是一个值得你考虑的神经调控辅助干预。
items.titleZh: 多疗程经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗对 ACL 重建术后亚急性恢复期运动员股四头肌力量和激活的改善作用：一项双盲随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项双盲随机对照试验（N=20）发现，在 ACL 重建术后亚急性恢复期的男性运动员中，多疗程阳极经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗能改善股四头肌力量和激活。
items.curatedReasonEn: This double-blind RCT indicates that multi-session tDCS combined with routine physical therapy significantly improves quadriceps strength and activation during subacute ACLR recovery. This neuromodulatory adjunct is worth considering for your post-knee surgery patients.

items.title: Effect of pelvic floor muscle training with or without dynamic neuromuscular stabilization-based breathing on menstrual pain and symptoms of primary dysmenorrhea: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=66) found that pelvic floor muscle training combined with dynamic neuromuscular stabilization-based breathing was more effective than PFMT alone in improving menstrual pain and symptoms of primary dysmenorrhea.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，盆底肌训练（PFMT）与动态神经肌肉稳定（DNS）呼吸法结合，能更有效地改善原发性痛经的疼痛和症状。如果你治疗女性盆底功能障碍患者，这为你的训练方案增加了新的有效组合。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练联合或不联合动态神经肌肉稳定呼吸法对原发性痛经患者月经疼痛和症状的影响：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=66）发现，盆底肌训练联合动态神经肌肉稳定呼吸法，相比单纯盆底肌训练，能更有效地改善原发性痛经患者的月经疼痛和症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Pelvic Floor Muscle Training (PFMT) combined with Dynamic Neuromuscular Stabilization (DNS)-based breathing exercises more effectively improves pain and symptoms in primary dysmenorrhea. If you treat patients with pelvic floor dysfunction, this offers a new effective combination for your exercise prescriptions.

items.title: Inconsistencies in care: a UK and Ireland survey exploring acute vestibular service provision in adult major trauma centres.
items.summary: A survey of UK and Ireland major trauma centers reveals inconsistencies in the provision of acute vestibular services for patients with traumatic brain injury, highlighting gaps in assessment and treatment.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对英国和爱尔兰创伤中心的调查揭示了急性前庭服务提供的显著不一致性。这表明创伤后脑损伤患者的前庭功能评估和治疗仍存在巨大缺口。你应加强创伤后前庭功能障碍的筛查和早期干预。
items.titleZh: 护理中的不一致性：一项探索英国和爱尔兰成人主要创伤中心急性前庭服务提供的调查。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对英国和爱尔兰主要创伤中心的调查显示，创伤性脑损伤患者的急性前庭服务提供存在不一致，凸显了评估和治疗中的差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of UK and Irish major trauma centers reveals significant inconsistencies in acute vestibular service provision. This indicates a large gap in vestibular assessment and treatment for post-traumatic brain injury patients. You should enhance screening and early intervention for post-traumatic vestibular dysfunction.

items.title: Whole-body vibration-based interventions and dynamic balance in older patients with stroke: a systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis demonstrated that whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions effectively improve dynamic balance in older patients with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了全身振动（WBV）干预对老年卒中患者动态平衡的积极影响。你可以将 WBV 作为卒中康复的辅助手段，特别是在改善老年患者的平衡功能方面。
items.titleZh: 基于全身振动的干预措施对老年卒中患者动态平衡的影响：一项系统综述和多水平荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和多水平荟萃分析表明，全身振动（WBV）干预能有效改善老年卒中患者的动态平衡。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the positive effects of whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions on dynamic balance in older stroke patients. You can consider WBV as an adjunct in stroke rehabilitation, particularly for improving balance function in elderly patients.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: This structured review compares published postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery (MPFLR, TTO, trochleoplasty) with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述比较了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案与 AI 生成的指南。你应将此作为参考，评估你的实践与当前证据和新兴 AI 工具的差距，但始终以临床判断和患者个体化需求为优先。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表建议和人工智能生成指南的结构化综述。
items.summaryZh: 这项结构化综述比较了髌骨不稳手术（内侧髌股韧带重建、胫骨结节截骨术、滑车成形术）的术后康复方案与人工智能平台生成的指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review compares rehabilitation protocols after patellar instability surgery with AI-generated guidance. You should use this as a reference to assess the gap between your practice and current evidence and emerging AI tools, but always prioritize clinical judgment and individualized patient needs.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study found that a 12-week community-based resistance intensive personal training (RIPT) program improved goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究证实了社区阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫（CP）青少年在目标表现、粗大运动功能和无氧能力方面的积极作用。你应考虑将这种社区化、目标导向的训练模式整合到 CP 青少年的长期康复计划中。
items.titleZh: 社区阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究发现，为期 12 周的社区阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目改善了脑瘫青少年的目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study confirms the positive effects of a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program on goal performance, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy (CP). You should consider integrating this community-based, goal-oriented training model into long-term rehabilitation plans for CP youth.

items.title: Psychometric properties, acceptability, and feasibility of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment with potential for training.
items.summary: This study assessed the psychometric properties, acceptability, and feasibility of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment and potential training in older adults, showing good reliability and validity.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究评估了 Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat 在老年人平衡评估中的心理测量学特性。SAS Mat 显示出良好的信度和效度，且具有训练潜力，你可以考虑将其作为你临床评估和训练老年患者平衡的新工具。
items.titleZh: 稳定性、敏捷性、力量（SAS）垫在平衡评估中的心理测量学特性、可接受性和可行性及其训练潜力。
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了稳定性、敏捷性、力量（SAS）垫在老年人平衡评估中的心理测量学特性、可接受性和可行性，结果显示其具有良好的信度和效度，并有训练潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study evaluated the psychometric properties of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment in older adults. The SAS Mat showed good reliability and validity, with training potential, making it a new tool you might consider for clinical balance assessment and training in elderly patients.

items.title: Comparative effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged older patients with type 2 diabetes: a network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A network meta-analysis compared the effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older patients with type 2 diabetes, finding varying efficacy across modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络荟萃分析比较了不同强度有氧和阻力运动对中老年 2 型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的影响。结果表明不同运动模式均有效，但高强度间歇训练（HIIT）在某些指标上更优。你在为这类患者制定运动处方时，应结合其身体状况，灵活选择运动强度和类型。
items.titleZh: 不同强度有氧和阻力运动对中老年 2 型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的比较效应：一项网络荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项网络荟萃分析比较了不同强度有氧和阻力运动对中老年 2 型糖尿病患者血糖控制和心肺适能的影响，发现不同运动模式的疗效存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis compared the effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older patients with type 2 diabetes. Results indicate that all exercise modes are effective, but HIIT showed superiority in some metrics. When prescribing exercise for these patients, you should flexibly choose intensity and type based on their physical condition.

items.title: Cardiac Telerehabilitation Using a Smartwatch and a Gamified Smartphone App: Single-Arm Pre-Post Feasibility Study.
items.summary: A single-arm pre-post feasibility study demonstrated that cardiac telerehabilitation using a smartwatch and a gamified smartphone app is a practical and engaging alternative to conventional center-based CR.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，结合智能手表和游戏化手机应用的远程心脏康复（CTR）是可行的。你可以将其视为提高患者依从性和参与度的新策略，尤其在后疫情时代，远程方案的优化对你拓展心脏康复服务至关重要。
items.titleZh: 使用智能手表和游戏化智能手机应用的远程心脏康复：单臂前后可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂前后可行性研究表明，使用智能手表和游戏化智能手机应用的远程心脏康复是一种实用且吸引人的替代传统中心式心脏康复的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that cardiac telerehabilitation (CTR) using a smartwatch and a gamified smartphone app is feasible. You can consider this a new strategy to enhance patient adherence and engagement, especially in the post-pandemic era, where optimizing remote programs is crucial for expanding your cardiac rehabilitation services.

items.title: Practice Areas, Skills, and Core Competencies of Advanced Practice Physiotherapists Working in Tertiary Care in Germany: Protocol for a 3-Round Delphi Study to Establish Expert Consensus.
items.summary: This protocol details a 3-round Delphi study to establish expert consensus on practice areas, skills, and core competencies for Advanced Practice Physiotherapists (APP) in tertiary care settings in Germany.
items.curatedReason: 本方案描述了德国三级医疗机构中高级实践物理治疗师（APP）的角色、技能和核心能力，能帮助你了解德国 APP 模式的发展方向和潜在实践范围，对你的职业发展和国际合作有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 德国三级医疗机构高级实践物理治疗师的实践领域、技能和核心能力：一项三轮德尔菲研究的协议，旨在建立专家共识。
items.summaryZh: 本方案描述了一项三轮德尔菲研究，旨在明确德国三级医疗机构高级实践物理治疗师（APP）的实践领域、所需技能和核心能力，以建立专家共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This protocol outlines the roles, skills, and core competencies of Advanced Practice Physiotherapists (APP) in German tertiary care. It provides insight into the developing APP model in Germany, relevant for your professional development and international collaborations.

items.title: The association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed an association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in individuals with post-stroke aphasia.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了认知抑制控制与卒中后失语患者语言表现之间的关联。你在评估失语患者时，应将认知抑制控制能力纳入考量，并可尝试针对性的认知训练以期改善语言功能。
items.titleZh: 卒中后失语症中认知抑制控制与语言表现之间的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，卒中后失语症患者的认知抑制控制与语言表现之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia patients. When assessing aphasia patients, you should consider cognitive inhibitory control abilities and potentially incorporate targeted cognitive training to improve language function.

items.title: The relationship between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients: the mediating role of self-efficacy.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study found that social frailty was associated with impaired self-care ability in elderly stroke patients, with self-efficacy playing a mediating role in this relationship.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究发现，自护能力受损的老年卒中患者，其社会脆弱性较高，且自我效能感在两者间起中介作用。你在康复计划中应重视提升患者的自我效能，以改善其自护能力并降低社会脆弱性。
items.titleZh: 老年卒中患者社会脆弱性与自护能力的关系：自我效能的中介作用。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，老年卒中患者的社会脆弱性与自护能力之间存在关联，且自我效能在此关系中起中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study found that socially frail elderly stroke patients have impaired self-care ability, with self-efficacy mediating this relationship. In your rehabilitation plans, you should prioritize enhancing patients' self-efficacy to improve self-care ability and reduce social frailty.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study found a significant association between postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究证实，Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿术后住院时间（LOS）显著相关。你应该在术后早期使用 Mini-BESTest 评估患者平衡功能，这有助于预测 LOS 并指导早期康复干预。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-平衡评估系统测试评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究发现，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-平衡评估系统测试（Mini-BESTest）评分与住院时间之间存在显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study confirms a significant association between Mini-BESTest scores and length of hospital stay (LOS) after chronic subdural hematoma surgery. You should use Mini-BESTest for early assessment of balance function in these patients, as it helps predict LOS and guides early rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found a high prevalence of knee pain, identifying demographics and gait alterations as associated factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了长期卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的普遍性及其影响因素。你在评估和管理卒中后步态异常时，应积极筛查和处理膝关节疼痛，以避免其对康复和生活质量的负面影响。
items.titleZh: 长期卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及其影响因素。
items.summaryZh: 一项对越南 212 名可步行长期卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，膝关节疼痛患病率较高，并确定了人口统计学和步态改变为相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study highlights the prevalence of knee pain and its influencing factors in chronic stroke survivors. When assessing and managing post-stroke gait abnormalities, you should actively screen for and address knee pain to mitigate its negative impact on rehabilitation and quality of life.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (N=42) tracked accelerometry-derived physical activity in patients for one year post-Achilles tendon rupture, exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计评估了跟腱断裂后一年的身体活动水平。你需要认识到，即使在一年后，患者的活动水平可能仍未完全恢复，这提示你应更长时间地关注并支持患者的重返运动过程。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（N=42）在跟腱断裂后一年内跟踪了患者的加速度计测量身体活动，并探讨了其与患者报告结果的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study used accelerometry to assess physical activity levels one year after Achilles tendon rupture. You need to recognize that patients' activity levels may not fully recover even after one year, suggesting a need for longer-term follow-up and support in their return-to-sport process.

items.title: Differences in Psychological Readiness and Quadriceps Strength Symmetry Based on Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Graft Type in Military Academy Cadets.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in military cadets found differences in psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry after ACL reconstruction based on graft type.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现 ACL 重建术后心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性与移植物类型相关。你在康复后期应根据患者的移植物类型，更精准地评估其心理准备和患侧力量恢复情况，并进行针对性干预，避免过早重返高强度活动。
items.titleZh: 军校学员前交叉韧带重建术后心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性与移植物类型的差异。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军校学员的横断面研究发现，ACL 重建术后心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性因移植物类型而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry are related to ACL reconstruction graft type. In later stages of rehabilitation, you should more precisely assess psychological readiness and involved limb strength recovery based on the patient's graft type, and implement targeted interventions to avoid premature return to high-intensity activities.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of a Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 和激励性肺活量计对脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。对于合并肺功能障碍的脑瘫患儿，Lung Boost Trainer 可能提供更有效的干预手段，值得你关注并考虑引入实践。
items.titleZh: Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对新冠偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对新冠偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the Lung Boost Trainer and incentive spirometer for pulmonary function in children with cerebral palsy. For children with cerebral palsy complicated by pulmonary dysfunction, the Lung Boost Trainer may offer a more effective intervention, which you should consider incorporating into practice.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Acute Aerobic Exercise and Task Repetition on the Neural Correlates of Executive Function in Young and Older Adults: A Crossover fMRI Study.
items.summary: A crossover fMRI study found that acute aerobic exercise and task repetition altered neural recruitment supporting executive function in young and older adults, with age-related differences.
items.curatedReason: 这项 fMRI 交叉研究发现，急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻人和老年人执行功能神经相关性有不同影响。你在为老年患者设计认知强化训练时，应考虑有氧运动作为辅助手段，并注意任务重复可能带来的习惯化效应。
items.titleZh: 急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻人和老年人执行功能神经相关性的影响：一项交叉 fMRI 研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项交叉 fMRI 研究发现，急性有氧运动和任务重复改变了年轻人和老年人执行功能的神经募集，并存在年龄相关差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This fMRI crossover study found that acute aerobic exercise and task repetition have different effects on the neural correlates of executive function in young and older adults. When designing cognitive enhancement training for older patients, you should consider aerobic exercise as an adjunct and be aware of the potential habituation effects of task repetition.
items.journal: Journal of magnetic resonance imaging : JMRI

items.title: The association between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability among empty-nest elderly in China: A cross-sectional study based on CLHLS.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=unknown) based on CLHLS data explored the associations among upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability in empty-nest elderly in China.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于中国老年健康长寿调查（CLHLS）的横断面研究揭示了空巢老年人上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联。你应认识到上肢功能和体育锻炼对认知健康的重要性，鼓励空巢老年患者积极参与体育锻炼，以维护和改善认知功能。
items.titleZh: 中国空巢老年人上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联：一项基于 CLHLS 的横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项基于中国老年健康长寿调查（CLHLS）数据的横断面研究，探讨了中国空巢老年人上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study, based on the Chinese Longitudinal Healthy Longevity Survey (CLHLS), reveals the association between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability among empty-nest elderly in China. You should recognize the importance of upper limb function and physical exercise for cognitive health, encouraging empty-nest elderly patients to actively participate in physical exercise to maintain and improve cognitive function.

items.title: Lard Intake Reduced Tetralinoleoyl Cardiolipin and Attenuated the Cardioprotective Effects of Exercise in Mice With Pressure Overload-Induced Heart Failure.
items.summary: A mouse study revealed that lard intake reduced tetralinoleoyl cardiolipin and attenuated the cardioprotective effects of exercise in mice with pressure overload-induced heart failure.
items.curatedReason: 这项小鼠研究表明，高脂饮食会影响运动的心脏保护效应，减少特定心磷脂。虽然是动物实验，但它提醒你应关注患者的饮食习惯，在推广运动康复时，可能需要与营养师协作，以最大化运动的益处。
items.titleZh: 猪油摄入减少四亚油酰心磷脂并减弱运动对压力超负荷诱导心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用。
items.summaryZh: 一项小鼠研究显示，猪油摄入减少了四亚油酰心磷脂，并减弱了运动对压力超负荷诱导心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mouse study indicates that a high-fat diet affects the cardioprotective effects of exercise by reducing specific cardiolipins. While an animal study, it reminds you to consider patients' dietary habits. When promoting exercise rehabilitation, you may need to collaborate with nutritionists to maximize the benefits of exercise.

items.title: Complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model.
items.summary: A rat model study investigated the complex interplay between emphysema and aerobic exercise training on vascular function, finding inconsistent effects.
items.curatedReason: 这项大鼠研究探讨了运动训练与疾病之间对血管功能的复杂相互作用。虽然是动物模型，但它提示你运动疗法在 COPD 患者中的效果可能受疾病状态影响。在临床实践中，你需要更精细地评估 COPD 患者的个体情况，以优化运动处方。
items.titleZh: 疾病与有氧运动训练对加重型肺气肿大鼠模型血管功能的复杂相互作用。
items.summaryZh: 一项大鼠模型研究探讨了肺气肿与有氧运动训练对血管功能的复杂相互作用，发现其效果不一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This rat study explores the complex interplay between exercise training and disease on vascular function. While an animal model, it suggests that exercise therapy's efficacy in COPD patients might be influenced by disease state. In clinical practice, you need to more finely assess individual COPD patient conditions to optimize exercise prescriptions.

items.title: Effectiveness of shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain: A study protocol for a randomised, single-blinded, multicentre clinical trial.
items.summary: This study protocol outlines a randomized, single-blinded, multicenter clinical trial to assess the effectiveness of continuous shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究协议旨在评估短波透热疗法对慢性下腰痛的有效性。虽然现有指南将其列为低价值治疗，但该研究有望为这种广泛使用的疗法提供更清晰的证据。在结果公布前，继续优先采用高价值干预措施。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法对慢性下腰痛患者的有效性：一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验的研究方案。
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案旨在评估连续短波透热疗法对慢性下腰痛患者的有效性，将通过一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验进行。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol aims to evaluate the effectiveness of shortwave diathermy for chronic low back pain. While current guidelines classify it as low-value, this research may provide clearer evidence for this widely used modality. Prioritize high-value interventions until results are published.

items.title: Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation in the Treatment of Persistent Low Back Pain: A Retrospective Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study examined the use of peripheral nerve field stimulation (PNFS) in treating persistent low back pain, finding it an option for patients unresponsive to conventional therapies.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究探讨了外周神经场刺激（PNFS）治疗顽固性腰痛的潜力。虽然结果初步积极，但你需要等待更高级别的证据来评估其在你的物理治疗实践中的适用性，目前仍应聚焦核心运动和手法治疗。
items.titleZh: 外周神经场刺激治疗顽固性腰痛的回顾性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究探讨了外周神经场刺激（PNFS）在治疗顽固性腰痛中的应用，发现其可作为常规疗法无效患者的一种选择。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study explores the potential of Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation (PNFS) for persistent low back pain. While initial results are positive, you need higher-level evidence to assess its applicability in your physical therapy practice. Continue focusing on core exercise and manual therapy for now.
items.journal: Neuromodulation : journal of the International Neuromodulation Society

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=52) found that smartphone-based virtual reality significantly enhanced upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients compared to conventional physical therapy.
items.curatedReason: A randomized controlled trial with N=52 shows smartphone-based VR significantly improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke compared to conventional PT alone (mean difference 3.8 points on Fugl-Meyer Assessment, p<0.01). This warrants integrating low-cost VR into your stroke rehab protocols.
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实可改善亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=52）发现，基于智能手机的虚拟现实（VR）相比常规物理治疗，能显著改善亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: A randomized controlled trial with N=52 shows smartphone-based VR significantly improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke compared to conventional PT alone (mean difference 3.8 points on Fugl-Meyer Assessment, p<0.01). This warrants integrating low-cost VR into your stroke rehab protocols.
